title: Voxelized Furniture
description: this mod adds chairs, tables, kitchen sets, sinks, and small land pieces you can use in your builds. It’s mainly for decorating houses, rooms, and custom areas, and gives you more basic objects to work with when building or roleplaying.
body:
**_After a long time and starting development since 2025. okil6 is introducing a new mod voxelized furniture. this mods adds unique features that has almost never been seen beffore in other furniture mods. this is what it adds:_**

- **Sittable chairs**
- **Cabinets**
- **Wardrobes**
- **Geodes**
- **Lights and light switches**
- **Miniture pieces of land**
- **Plants**
- **Working Tvs and Laptops**
- **Kitchen Sets**
- **Decor beds**

### Features:

- **Working light switches this light switch can turn on/off any light in 20 blocks!**
- **Working shower this shower can be powered by redstone!**
- **Sittable chairs the chairs are sittable and can be rotated by shift + right clicking**

**Models made in** ![Blockbench logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb911e72eb93ebbac833a834bab56bf71ebecec0_0.webp)

 **Coded in**  ![Mcreator logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5007f99371b4b0a0fbbc7e564db8a9a6fedcbc65_0.webp)

# **Bugs**
